channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 11 com severidade Alta
• 25 novas CVEs
• 6 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

📰 Encrypted vMotion Offload to Intel QAT in VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
One of the most common missed opportunities in enterprise infrastructure is not fully leveraging the hardware that is already in the rack. Getting the most out of your investment requires careful mapping of what your hardware is actually capable of and what your software platform can take advantage of, and that …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/21/encrypted-vmotion-offload-to-intel-qat-in-vmware-cloud-foundation-9-1/
 
📰 Grafana Labs links GitHub environment breach to TanStack npm supply chain attack - Cybersecurity Dive
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Grafana, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisAFBVV95cUxNMnl4WFpmMW9OUTMxZ20telNIc0ZaNUZfWDNMeWdTVTVaSDAxM2Q0YjRUVENQLTh1NnVPSTdfeE55YUktR3JTY1lGRm9JWVZiNzJ0RXNoVWJXWi0wRzU3MTljYU9Fa3NxaDExQTc2MzNaNlhxb3VjNXhZbDJkX0EwMHdaLVJHWVU3UUVqUzU3WDkwM3ozejd1QnJJRmZjMVl2NnZ5M1c1Tmo2UkxJaDlXRw?oc=5
 
📰 Grafana breach caused by missed token rotation after TanStack attack - BleepingComputer
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Grafana, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Increase Deployment Flexibility with VCF Edge Automation 1.0.3
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 1.0
Resumo:
VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) is widely recognized as the foundation for enterprise-grade private clouds in centralized data centers. VMware Cloud Foundation Edge (VCF Edge) expands upon this architecture, providing a unified platform specifically engineered for distributed environments. VCF Edge enables enterprises to host traditional virtual machines, containerized applications via VMware vSphere Kubernetes Service...
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/20/increase-deployment-flexibility-with-vcf-edge-automation-1-0-3/
 
📰 Deepen Your Expertise: Four Key Benefits of Attending
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Join us at VMware Explore Las Vegas, Nevada | The Venetian Aug. 3, 2026 REGISTER NOW Elevate your skills, connect with the experts solving real-world challenges, and bring immediate value back to your organization. Are you finding it difficult to keep pace with the evolving demands of private cloud infrastructure and the …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/explore/why-customers-should-attend-explore/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 CVE-2026-9141 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
Taiko AG1000-01A SMS Alert Gateway Rev 7.3 and Rev 8 contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the embedded web configuration interface that allows unauthenticated attackers to access internal application pages without any session management or server-side authentication checks. Attackers with network access can directly request internal resources such as index.zhtml, point.zhtml, and log.shtml to gain full...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9141
 
🚨 Cisco Patches CVSS 10.0 Secure Workload REST API Flaw Enabling Data Access
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 0.0
Resumo:
Cisco has rolled out updates for a maximum-severity security flaw impacting Secure Workload that could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to access sensitive data. Tracked as CVE-2026-20223 (CVSS score: 10.0), the vulnerability arises from insufficient validation and authentication when accessing REST API endpoints. "An attacker could exploit this vulnerability if they are able to send
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/cisco-patches-cvss-100-secure-workload.html
 
💣 Drupal: Critical SQL injection flaw now targeted in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Drupal is warning that hackers are attempting to exploit a "highly critical" SQL injection vulnerability announced earlier this week.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/drupal-critical-sql-injection-flaw-now-targeted-in-attacks/
 
💣 Trend Micro warns of Apex One zero-day exploited in the wild
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Japanese cybersecurity software company Trend Micro has addressed an Apex One zero-day vulnerability exploited in attacks targeting Windows systems.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/trend-micro-warns-of-apex-one-zero-day-exploited-in-attacks/
 
💣 Ubiquiti patches three max severity UniFi OS vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Ubiquiti has released security updates to patch three maximum severity vulnerabilities in UniFi OS that can be exploited by remote attackers without privileges.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/ubiquiti-patches-three-max-severity-unifi-os-vulnerabilities/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-7613 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.2
Resumo:
The Cost of Goods by PixelYourSite plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'csvdata[0][cost_of_goods_value]' parameter in versions up to, and including, 1.2.12 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7613
 
🚨 USN-8277-2: Linux kernel (Oracle) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that the Linux kernel algif_aead module did not properly handle in-place cryptographic operations. A local attacker could use this to escalate privileges, or possibly escape a container. (CVE-2026-31431) Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly use these to compromise the system. This update corrects flaws in the following subsystems: - S390 architectur...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8277-2
 
🚨 USN-8292-1: libarchive vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that libarchive incorrectly handled certain RAR archives. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause an out-of-bounds read via a crafted RAR archive, leading to sensitive memory disclosure. (CVE-2026-4424) It was discovered that libarchive incorrectly handled certain ISO files. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause incorrect memory allocation via a crafted ISO file, leading to a...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8292-1
 
💣 Microsoft Defender Zero-Day Vulnerabilities RedSun and UnDefend Actively Exploited on Windows 10, 11, and Server (April 2026 CVE Analysis) - Rescana
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Windows Server. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
💣 Microsoft Warns of Two Actively Exploited Defender Vulnerabilities - The Hacker News
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Windows Server. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiekFVX3lxTE1hV1VKN3luRlFKTWM1cTJua3d4ZXpFOVg2WjJidFpNSE5peTA5RjJfSjdqZENPZzFhVkgtTEhSa3gtUXY5b1RodkNyMG5TVzlCSjczTXJ4dGloVWoyWmx5X1M4NkYtR2tHdTNpLXY3dTZoZ1ZtdzRacHp3?oc=5
 
💣 Teams exploit NFL leniency to troll Mike Vrabel during 2026 schedule release - MSN
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 20/05/2026 até 22/05/2026.
